data.title: ADC Therapeutics Announces New Employee Inducement Grant
data.description: In Lausanne, Switzerland on July 1, 2026, ADC Therapeutics SA (NYSE: ADCT), a prominent global company specializing in antibody drug conjugates (ADCs), revealed the granting of options. These options allow for the purchase of a combined total of 17,000...

data.title: Calamos Investments Closed-End Funds (NASDAQ: CHI, CHY, CSQ, CGO, CHW, CCD and CPZ) Announce Monthly Distributions and Required Notifications of Sources of Distribution
data.description: In July 2026, Calamos Investments® disclosed the monthly distributions and sources of distributions made to shareholders of its seven closed-end funds in Metro Chicago, Illinois. The funds' distribution plans were followed for these payments. The specific details of the fund distributions were not provided in the rephrased version.

data.title: Realty Income Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date
data.description: On July 1, 2026, Realty Income Corporation (NYSE: O) revealed plans to disclose its second quarter 2026 operating results after the New York Stock Exchange ends trading on August 5, 2026. Known as "The Monthly Dividend Company®," Realty Income is set to share important financial figures and performance updates with investors and the public.

data.title: Columbus McKinnon Announces CFO Transition
data.description: John R. Linker has been named as the new Chief Financial Officer of Columbus McKinnon Corporation, a prominent company in Charlotte, N.C. The announcement was made on July 1, 2026. The company, listed on Nasdaq as CMCO, specializes in the design, production, and marketing of intelligent solutions. In addition to this appointment, the Company has restated its guidance for the fiscal year of 2027.

data.title: Western Midstream Announces Availability of 2025 Schedule K-3
data.description: Today, Western Midstream Partners, LP (NYSE: WES) released its 2025 Schedule K-3 containing internationally relevant tax details. Unitholders can now access this information online. This update provides important insights for investors in WES.

data.title: CoStar Group to Report Financial Results for Second Quarter on July 28, 2026
data.description: A technology company, CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP), specializing in online real estate platforms and digital twin technology, is set to reveal its financial performance for the second quarter of 2026 on July 28, 2026. The announcement will be made after the market closes, followed by a conference call at 5:00 PM EDT on the same day. This call will cover the quarterly results and the company’s future prospects. The event will include a live audio webcast for stakeholders and investors.

data.title: IDEXX Laboratories to Release 2026 Second Quarter Financial Results
data.description: In Westbrook, Maine, IDEXX Laboratories, Inc., a leading innovator in pet healthcare (NASDAQ: IDXX), will announce its 2026 second quarter financial results on August 4, 2026, before the market opens. The company's analyst conference call will commence at 8:30 a.m. ET. Access to a live webcast of the call, prepared remarks transcript, and the Q2 2026 Earnings Snapshot will be available via a link on the IDEXX website.

data.title: Radiant Receives First TRISO Fuel Shipment at INL's DOME Facility, Clearing Path to Full-Power, Full-Temperature Testing
data.description: TRISO fuel has been successfully transported to the DOME facility at Idaho National Laboratory in El Segundo, California. This development marks a significant milestone in the energy sector, with the delivery including a substantial amount of TRISO fuel pellets. The safe arrival of this fuel underscores the important advancements being made in energy research and development. This achievement is a testament to the dedication and expertise of all involved in the transportation process.

data.title: Lattice Wins 2026 Cybersecurity Stars Award by The Hacker News
data.description: In Hillsboro, Oregon, Lattice Semiconductor (NASDAQ: LSCC) recently revealed that its Lattice MachXO5™-NX TDQ FPGA series had secured a notable accolade. The family clinched a 2026 Cybersecurity Stars Award in the "Best Post-Quantum Cryptography" division, as designated by The Hacker News. Mamta Gupta, the Associate Vice President of Strategic Business Development for Datacenter, expressed gratitude for the recognition. This win symbolizes the company's cybersecurity innovation prowess.

data.title: BRIXMOR PROPERTY GROUP REPORTS SECOND QUARTER INVESTMENT ACTIVITY, INCLUDING $164 MILLION OF ACQUISITIONS
data.description: Brixmor Property Group Inc. (NYSE: BRX) revealed its investment activities for the second quarter of 2026, showcasing a strategic approach to consolidating its portfolio by focusing on attractive markets. The report covers the period from April to June 2026, indicating the company's commitment to prudent management and growth.

data.title: 0x to Power Swap Liquidity and Cross-Chain Access on Robinhood Chain at Launch
data.description: In a recent update, it was announced that 0x is set to provide support for the Robinhood Chain. This support will entail RFQ-based liquidity designed for tokenized stock tokens, along with facilitating cross-chain swaps to enable users to transfer assets across various networks. The collaboration, effective from July 1, 2026, underscores 0x's role as a key software infrastructure provider in the finance sector. This development will streamline trading processes and enhance accessibility for users, marking a significant milestone for both companies.

data.title: Thornburg Income Builder Opportunities Trust Announces Distribution
data.description: In Santa Fe, New Mexico, on July 1, 2026, Thornburg Income Builder Opportunities Trust (NASDAQ: TBLD) disclosed a monthly distribution of $0.10417 per share for common shareholders. This distribution will be paid on July 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of July 13, 2026.

data.title: IM Cannabis Raises US$225,000 of Gross Proceeds in Convertible Note Financing
data.description: On July 1, 2026, IM Cannabis Corp. (NASDAQ: IMCC) revealed the conclusion of a private placement for a US$225,000 convertible note financing. The Company, based in Toronto and Glil Yam, Israel, is a medical cannabis firm operating in Israel and Germany.

data.title: O-AT-KA TEAMSTERS SECURE STRONG CONTRACT
data.description: In Batavia, New York, a collective bargaining agreement has been ratified by 338 dairy workers at O-AT-KA Milk Products, led by Teamsters Local 118. The agreement secures a significant 46% wage increase and improved benefits for the workers. The deal spans over a five-year period and marks a major win for the employees.

data.title: Kitsault Energy: A Nation-Building Opportunity to Increase Canada's GDP, Exports, and Global Competitiveness
data.description: New Delhi - Canada has the potential to emerge as a top global exporter of natural resources and value-added products amidst increasing demand for energy, critical minerals, agricultural goods, and strategic supply chains. To achieve this status, the country needs to make significant infrastructure investments, expedite project approval processes, and establish a comprehensive long-term national strategy. Kitsault Energy (KE) has been working towards this goal since January 2013. The initiative aims to establish a dedicated infrastructure to support this vision.

data.title: Xsolla and Pley: Unity Mobile Studios Can Now Reach and Monetize Players in 200+ Geographies Through the Browser
data.description: In Los Angeles, Xsolla, a global commerce company, revealed a collaboration with Pley, a platform dedicated to transferring, disseminating, and monetizing games online. This integration allows mobile game developers to extend their games to PC and mobile browsers, granting them instant entry to Xsolla's worldwide payment system embracing over 700 payment options in more than 200 locations. The core objective of this integration is to address a revenue deficiency that impacts many mobile game studios, particularly noticeable in markets such as Brazil, Poland, and the Philippines.

data.title: InvoiceCloud and CentralSquare Technologies Partner to Modernize Digital Payments for the Public Sector
data.description: Boston-based company InvoiceCloud, known for its digital billing and payment solutions, has teamed up with CentralSquare Technologies, a prominent provider of public sector software. This collaboration aims to provide modern, integrated payment experiences to governments and utilities throughout North America. By combining InvoiceCloud’s platform with CentralSquare’s software, this alliance offers a streamlined approach for offering residents convenient payment options. This partnership is set to benefit numerous organizations trying to enhance their billing processes and improve customer experiences.

data.title: AM Best Affirms Credit Ratings of Helvetica Re Rückversicherung AG Corporation
data.description: In Mexico City, AM Best has confirmed the Financial Strength Rating of A- (Excellent) and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Rating of “a-” (Excellent) for Helvetica Re Rückversicherung AG Corporation (Helvetica) based in Barbados. The stable outlook for these Credit Ratings (ratings) is due to Helvetica's strongest balance sheet strength, adequate operating performance, limited business reach, and appropriate enterprise risk management.

data.title: U.S. opts not to renew USMCA trade deal, triggering 10-year countdown to expiration. Businesses left unsure about agreement's future.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Trump administration announced that it would not immediately seek to renew the North American trade agreement. This decision has left businesses questioning the future of the trade deal. The North American trade agreement, involving the United States, Mexico, and Canada, is currently in a state of uncertainty as the administration holds off on the renewal process. This move has raised concerns among businesses and stakeholders, as they await clarity on the future of the agreement and its implications for trade among the three countries.
Apple is in discussions to buy memory chips from Chinese companies $AAPL
